title: Club cricket back in action this week
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Club cricket in the...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Club cricket in the Garden Route is all set to get up and running again in the new year, with clubs returning to action across all SWD leagues this weekend.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Club cricket in the Garden Route is all set to get up and running again in the new year, with clubs returning to action across all SWD leagues this weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Premier League clubs will be without their allocated professional players as the Garden Route Badgers will host the Northern Cape Heat at Oudtshoorn in a must-win CSA 4-Day Competition clash this weekend."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With all but two clubs having played four games already, the Premier League is also still a wide open affair with third-placed George only four points off Pacaltsdorp United in first.","html":"With all but two clubs having played four games already, the Premier League is also still a wide open affair with third-placed George only four points off Pacaltsdorp United in first."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna Cavaliers find themselves second coming into the new year, three points behind Pacaltsdorp, whom they face on Saturday in a top of the table encounter. Plett Pioneers are currently sixth, and face bottom of the log Harlequins Forces.","html":"Knysna Cavaliers find themselves second coming into the new year, three points behind Pacaltsdorp, whom they face on Saturday in a top of the table encounter. Plett Pioneers are currently sixth, and face bottom of the log Harlequins Forces."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In Pool B in the Promotion League Sussex are leading the way followed by Thembalethu and Bongolethu. Pirates United are fourth, five points behind top spot.","html":"In Pool B in the Promotion League Sussex are leading the way followed by Thembalethu and Bongolethu. Pirates United are fourth, five points behind top spot."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In Reserve League Division 1, Kranshoek Cobras find themselves in third place in Pool B. Then in Reserve League Division 2, Pirates United B are still top of Pool A, ahead only on net run rate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cavaliers B drew level with Pirates B in the log standings on Sunday, when they earned a bonus point win over Cavaliers C. Pioneers B are currently third in Pool A.","html":"Cavaliers B drew level with Pirates B in the log standings on Sunday, when they earned a bonus point win over Cavaliers C. Pioneers B are currently third in Pool A."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Finally, in the Women's League Division 2 the Cavaliers are log leaders ahead of Sussex (second) and Thembalethu (third). Cobras are fourth while Pioneers currently sit in sixth place.","html":"Finally, in the Women's League Division 2 the Cavaliers are log leaders ahead of Sussex (second) and Thembalethu (third). Cobras are fourth while Pioneers currently sit in sixth place."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The full list of fixtures for the weekend is:SaturdayPremier League: Harlequins Forces vs Plett Pioneers; George vs Union Stars II; Union Stars I vs Mossel Bay; Pacaltsdorp United vs Knysna Cavaliers","html":"The full list of fixtures for the weekend is:

Saturday

Premier League: Harlequins Forces vs Plett Pioneers; George vs Union Stars II; Union Stars I vs Mossel Bay; Pacaltsdorp United vs Knysna Cavaliers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Promotion League: Sussex vs Pirates United; Heidelberg United vs Hartenbos; Telesto Ramblers vs Riversdale","html":"Promotion League: Sussex vs Pirates United; Heidelberg United vs Hartenbos; Telesto Ramblers vs Riversdale"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reserve League Division 1: Masakhane vs Union Stars B; Kwanonqaba vs Pacaltsdorp United B; Melkhoutfontein vs Albertinia; Headliners vs Mayflower; Kranshoek Cobras vs Blanco","html":"Reserve League Division 1: Masakhane vs Union Stars B; Kwanonqaba vs Pacaltsdorp United B; Melkhoutfontein vs Albertinia; Headliners vs Mayflower; Kranshoek Cobras vs Blanco"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reserve League Division 2: Plett Pioneers B vs Knysna Cavaliers B; Thembalethu B vs Calitzdorp Young Stars","html":"Reserve League Division 2: Plett Pioneers B vs Knysna Cavaliers B; Thembalethu B vs Calitzdorp Young Stars"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Women’s Division 1:  Union Stars vs Pacaltsdorp United; Mossel Bay vs Harlequins Forces","html":"Women’s Division 1: Union Stars vs Pacaltsdorp United; Mossel Bay vs Harlequins Forces"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Women’s Division 2: Plett Pioneers vs Kranshoek Cobras; Sussex vs RiversdaleSunday","html":"Women’s Division 2: Plett Pioneers vs Kranshoek Cobras; Sussex vs Riversdale

Sunday"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reserve League Division 1: Harlequins’ Forces C vs Dysselsdorp","html":"Reserve League Division 1: Harlequins’ Forces C vs Dysselsdorp"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reserve League Division 2: Calitzdorp Young Stars vs Thembalethu B; Plett Pioneers C vs Kranshoek Cobras B; Knysna Cavaliers C vs Kranshoek Cobras B; Hartenbos B vs Sussex B; Mossel Bay C vs Mossel Bay B; Pacaltsdorp United C vs George B; George C vs Telesto Ramblers B","html":"Reserve League Division 2: Calitzdorp Young Stars vs Thembalethu B; Plett Pioneers C vs Kranshoek Cobras B; Knysna Cavaliers C vs Kranshoek Cobras B; Hartenbos B vs Sussex B; Mossel Bay C vs Mossel Bay B; Pacaltsdorp United C vs George B; George C vs Telesto Ramblers B"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Women’s Division 2: Thembalethu vs Knysna Cavaliers","html":"Women’s Division 2: Thembalethu vs Knysna Cavaliers"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
